violations.text: Opened packages of cheese, and deli meat were observed held past 7 days. Cheese and deli meat were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
Grab and go pastry items, were observed not labeled with list of ingredients. Grab and go items must be labeled with ingredients, and list all allergens. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

Ambient of Traulsen 2 door was observed held at 44 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, all foods in unit were prepared the morning of and moved into working unit. No TCS foods are to be stored in unit until it can hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or below. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024
Cheese was observed being held after date mark expired. PIC voluntarily disposed of cheese at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

Single service paper towel items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the bathroom area. PIC voluntarily disposed of paper towels at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
Bowl cover for the robocoup located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/05/2024
